injuries.name: Jake LaRavia
injuries.description: Apr 22: LaRavia exited Tuesday's 101-94 Game 2 win over the Rockets in the fourth quarter and did not return due to an apparent right leg issue, finishing with zero points (0-2 FG, 0-1 3Pt), two rebounds and one block across 16 minutes.

injuries.name: Jordan Goodwin
injuries.description: Apr 21: Goodwin (calf) is listed as questionable for Game 2 against the Thunder on Wednesday.

injuries.name: Mark Williams
injuries.description: Apr 21: Head coach Jordan Ott expects Williams (foot) to be listed as questionable for Game 2 on Wednesday versus the Thunder, per Duane Rankin of The Arizona Republic.

injuries.name: Victor Wembanyama
injuries.description: Apr 21: Wembanyama has been diagnosed with a concussion and will undergo further testing Wednesday, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

injuries.name: Jordan McLaughlin
injuries.description: Apr 21: McLaughlin (ankle) has been ruled out for Tuesday's Game 2 against the Trail Blazers.

injuries.name: Harrison Barnes
injuries.description: Apr 21: Barnes exited Tuesday's 106-103 Game 2 loss to the Trail Blazers in the fourth quarter and did not return due to an apparent left wrist injury, finishing with four points (1-3 FG, 0-1 3Pt, 2-2 FT) and one rebound in 15 minutes.
